rationale: The cited paper is used for a specific inferential procedure, not just background listing. In the results section, the authors explicitly state they use a floodlight analysis (citing Spiller et al. 2013) to probe moderated effects and determine regions where effects are significant across price/quality values. This citation functions as methodological guidance that directly shapes how interaction results are tested and interpreted.
relation_description: The citing paper applies Spiller et al. (2013)'s floodlight/simple-effects probing approach to its moderated regression results. It uses that framework to map where online search and ad-content effects on sales are statistically significant across moderator levels.
